data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides additional security layer to prevent unauthorized account access.
data.technical_spec: Offers SMS-based or app-based two-factor authentication options.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Encryption protocols are used to protect data and communications on the platform.
data.technical_spec: Implements encryption both in REST and transit for sensitive data.

data.title: Account Recovery Features
data.description: Various mechanisms are in place for recovering lost or compromised accounts.
data.technical_spec: Includes identity verification and multiple account recovery channels.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Incentivizes security researchers to report vulnerabilities and improve platform security.
data.technical_spec: Rewards program active for ethical hackers to find and report security flaws.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic audits to assess security posture and mitigate risks.
data.technical_spec: Internal and third-party security audits, including penetration testing.
